name: Business Starter
description: Pages plus a service schema, services collection, and sample service records so the business starter's Services page renders content out of the box.

schemas.description: A service offering for the business starter
schemas.formgrid:
id title
icon order
summary summary
description description
image image
updated created

title.label: Title
title.help: Service name as it appears on the page.

icon.label: Icon
icon.help: Optional emoji or icon shorthand shown next to the service title.

summary.label: Summary
summary.help: Short pitch — one sentence shown on the services grid.

description.label: Description
description.help: Long-form description shown on the service detail view.

image.label: Hero Image
image.help: Optional image used on the service detail view.

data.title: Strategy
data.summary: We work with you to define clear goals and a roadmap to get there.
data.description:
Every project starts with strategy. We sit down with you to map your business goals to concrete, measurable outcomes — then build the roadmap that gets you there. No vague deliverables, no jargon.

Engagements typically run 2–4 weeks and produce a written strategy document plus weekly check-ins.

data.title: Design
data.summary: Beautiful, functional designs that reflect your brand and engage your audience.
data.description:
Visual design that speaks to your customers and reflects who you are as a business. We work in Figma, hand off production-ready assets, and iterate based on real user feedback.

Includes brand identity, web design, and component systems for ongoing growth.

data.title: Development
data.summary: Custom-built solutions using modern technologies for performance and reliability.
data.description:
Web apps, internal tools, and integrations built to last. We favor proven, boring technology choices that you can maintain in-house — and we document everything we build.

Stack: PHP 8.4, Twig, modern JS, PostgreSQL or flat-file storage depending on the use case.

data.title: Ongoing Support
data.summary: Monthly retainers for security updates, content help, and feature work.
data.description:
Once your site is live, we stay on as your technical partner. Monthly retainers cover security patches, dependency updates, content additions, and small feature work.

Tiered packages from a few hours per month for maintenance up to half-time embedded engineering.
